name: Makashi Mastery
description: When a unit with the Makashi Mastery keyword makes a Melee attack, it can reduce the Pierce X value of a weapon in the Attack Pool by 1 during the Choose Weapons and Gather Dice step. If it does, the defender cannot use the Immune: Melee Pierce, Immune: Pierce, and/or Impervious keywords during this attack.
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Makashi Mastery keyword makes a Melee attack, it can reduce the Pierce X value of a weapon in the Attack Pool by 1 during the Choose Weapons and Gather Dice step.
